summary: The character also loses any of the following

mechanics.name_guess: The character also loses any of the following
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 033 > npcs > The character also loses any of the following
mechanics.excerpt: The character also loses any of the following traits accumulated up to that point: Rank, Commission, Vehicle , Custom Vehicle , Well: Equipped or Well-Connected The character can take the Owns Vehicle and Wealth traits, though they must be acquired through the Life Path or purchased later per standard rules_ Civlllan Castes The people of the Inner Sphere see the Clans as martial society; living to fight and conquer.
